summary: Completed testing of AI Copilot and Narrative Reports bug fixes. All features working correctly with GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot with client_id returns model='gpt-4o-mini' (real AI response)
Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot without client_id returns helpful response
Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot 'Summarize client' returns client-specific summary
Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot 'Suggest tags' returns relevant tags based on client services
Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot 'Next actions' returns actionable suggestions
Backend: POST /api/ai/copilot 'Missing fields' identifies incomplete data
Backend: POST /api/reports/narrative generates AI-powered narratives for all clients
Backend: POST /api/reports/narrative with specific client_ids generates per-client narratives
Backend: GET /api/ai/templates returns 4 action templates
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-form returns prefilled form data
Backend: Case worker role can access AI Copilot
Frontend: AI Copilot panel opens from client detail page
Frontend: 'Summarize client' button generates client-specific summary (mentions actual client name 'Aisha Johnson')
Frontend: AI response shows bold formatted text with markdown rendering (18 bold elements found)
Frontend: 'Suggest tags' button returns relevant tags
Frontend: 'Next actions' button returns actionable suggestions
Frontend: 'Missing fields' button identifies incomplete data
Frontend: Reports page AI Narrative section visible
Frontend: 'Generate Narrative Report' button triggers AI generation
Frontend: AI Narratives generated for 12 clients with professional, readable text
Frontend: Each narrative includes client-specific details (services, outcomes, goals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI features now use GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env). AICopilot.js extracts client_id from URL path (/clients/abc123 -> abc123). Backend routes/ai.py uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat. AI responses contain markdown with **bold** formatting rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Narrative reports generate professional summaries for all 12 demo clients in ~27 seconds.

ai_copilot_client_summary.description: AI Copilot generates client-specific summaries using GPT-4o-mini

ai_copilot_markdown_rendering.description: AI responses render markdown with bold text (**text** -> text)

ai_copilot_suggest_tags.description: Returns relevant tags based on client services

ai_copilot_next_actions.description: Returns actionable suggestions specific to client

ai_narrative_reports.description: Generates AI-powered narrative summaries for all clients

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: AI assistant summarize client didn't make sense - returned generic static text
root_causes_fixed: client_id now auto-detected from URL path in AICopilot.js
Switched from failing HF API to GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key
Narrative reports now use real AI-generated text instead of template strings
Markdown rendering added for bold formatting in chat messages
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: All fixes confirmed working - AI returns client-specific, professional summaries
